scripts.title: The Moment You Step Inside
scripts.concept: POV transformation from muggle world to wizarding world

shots.visual: Black screen with glowing golden text appearing, then quick flash of ordinary museum entrance doors
shots.text_overlay: POV: You just walked through these doors...
shots.audio: Dramatic pause, then first note of magical theme
shots.camera: Static, then quick zoom on doors

shots.visual: Sweeping reveal of Hogwarts Great Hall with floating candles, long tables, and visitors in robes looking up in wonder. Golden light streaming through tall windows.
shots.audio: Full orchestral swell, gasps of amazement
shots.camera: Dramatic upward tilt revealing floating candles

shots.visual: Quick montage: child's face lighting up, someone trying on Sorting Hat, wands glowing, magical creatures moving
shots.text_overlay: Tickets disappearing faster than a Snitch ⚡
shots.audio: Music crescendo with magical sound effects

music.build: Quiet mystery to full magical crescendo
music.reference_track: Harry Potter theme meets trending TikTok audio

scripts.caption: 500,000+ visitors. 200+ original props. One fully recreated Great Hall. This is the exhibition selling out in 15 cities worldwide. Limited dates remaining. Link in bio for tickets. #HarryPotterExhibition #Hogwarts #DontMissThis #BookNow
scripts.cta: Limited tickets remaining → Link in bio

scripts.title: What Everyone's Talking About
scripts.concept: FOMO-driven experience showcase with real reactions

shots.visual: Person scrolling through Instagram stories of friends at the exhibition, looking envious
shots.transition: Phone screen expands to full frame

shots.visual: Diagon Alley recreation with brick walls, shop windows, and visitors exploring with wonder
Authentic movie props behind glass: Harry's glasses, wands, Hermione's Time-Turner
Massive animatronic Buckbeak moving, visitors gasping and stepping back in awe
shots.camera: Low angle looking up at Buckbeak

shots.visual: Family in Sorting Hat ceremony, child gets sorted into house, everyone cheering
Quick montage of genuine reactions: tears of joy, amazed faces, couples holding hands in wonder, kids with mouths open
shots.text_overlay: This is what magic feels like

shots.visual: Exhibition logo with golden snitch flying around it, dates and location appearing

music.build: Intimate beginning to soaring emotional peak

scripts.caption: 4.9/5 visitor rating. 200+ authentic props. 15 cities sold out. This is the Harry Potter Exhibition everyone is talking about. Walk Diagon Alley. Sit under the Sorting Hat. See the actual movie magic. Dates selling fast. Link in bio. #HarryPotterExhibition #ImmersiveExperience #BookNow
scripts.cta: Check available dates → Link in bio

scripts.title: The Magic Is Real
scripts.concept: Movie trailer transformation journey from ordinary to extraordinary

shots.visual: Black screen with white text fading in slowly, then cut to ordinary city street with people walking past exhibition building
shots.text_overlay: Some stories... live only in our imagination
shots.camera: Static text, then wide establishing shot

shots.visual: Person approaching exhibition entrance, hesitating at the door, looking uncertain
Door opens revealing warm golden light, first glimpse of magical interior with floating candles
Slow reveal of Great Hall in full glory - long tables, house banners, hundreds of floating candles, visitors in robes
Montage: Hands touching authentic wands, close-up of intricate costume details, Marauder's Map unfolding
Forbidden Forest section with massive trees, glowing eyes in darkness, visitors looking up in awe and slight fear
shots.camera: Low angle looking up through trees

shots.visual: Quidditch area with flying broomsticks, golden snitch hovering, visitors trying to catch it
Emotional reactions montage: grandmother and grandchild sharing wonder, couple holding hands in amazement, teenager crying happy tears, family group hug
shots.camera: Close intimate shots of genuine emotion

shots.visual: Wide shot of visitor leaving exhibition, transformed, looking back one last time at the magical doorway
Exhibition logo materializes with golden particles, dates and location information, website URL
shots.text_overlay: The magic is real • Now open • Limited time
shots.audio: Final magical crescendo and logo sting

music.build: Intimate piano to full emotional orchestral climax

scripts.caption: Magic isn't just in stories. It's waiting for you to step inside and feel it for yourself. This is your invitation to a world where wonder is real and memories are made that last forever. ✨ Limited engagement. Book now.
scripts.cta: Experience the magic → Book tickets at harrypotter-exhibition.com
